title: Pipeline docs: kill initiative refs, add project brainstorm + completion gate steps

tasks.title: Replace initiative terminology across all pipeline and reference docs

dod.criterion: Zero occurrences of 'initiative' (case-insensitive) in any file under .claude/skills/directive/docs/
Replacements are contextually correct: Morgan plan items = project, execution items = task
09-execute-initiatives.md renamed to 09-execute-projects.md
All SKILL.md routing table entries updated for the renamed file
All cross-doc links to old filename updated
Excludes directive-json.md, current-json.md, morgan-plan.md (handled by schema project)

tasks.title: Add Step 3c project brainstorm to pipeline docs

dod.criterion: New pipeline doc 07b-project-brainstorm.md exists with full instructions
Doc specifies: inputs (morgan-plan, audit, directive brainstorm), participants (Sarah + builder), outputs (tasks[] with DOD in project.json)
SKILL.md routing table includes Step 3c pointing to 07b-project-brainstorm.md
07-plan-approval.md references project brainstorm as next step after approval

tasks.title: Add CEO completion gate step -- ALL directives require CEO sign-off

dod.criterion: New pipeline doc 11-completion-gate.md exists
ALL directives (including lightweight) set status to awaiting_completion after wrapup
10-wrapup.md Step 6g sets status to awaiting_completion instead of completed
Completion doc covers: approve flow (-> completed), reject flow (-> stays in_progress with CEO feedback)
SKILL.md routing table includes completion gate step

tasks.title: Resolve 7 conflicts and 3 contradictions from Sarah's audit

dod.criterion: C5-C6: 00-delegation-and-triage.md updated -- ALL weights require CEO completion approval
IC1: vision.md risk-based authority updated to reflect universal completion gate
IC2: 10-wrapup.md Step 6g checks browser_test before marking awaiting_completion
IC3: 10-wrapup.md documents that completing with failed tasks requires explanation in digest
Each conflict resolution traceable to specific C# or IC# from audit

tasks.title: Update Morgan's prompt template to output projects instead of initiatives

dod.criterion: morgan-prompt.md instructs Morgan to output projects[]
Morgan output template does NOT include definition_of_done or tasks per project
Example output matches updated morgan-plan.md schema
Zero occurrences of 'initiative' in morgan-prompt.md

tasks.title: Update agent prompt files, MEMORY.md, and lessons for new terminology

dod.criterion: Zero occurrences of 'initiative' in any .claude/agents/*.md file (10 files, 26 occurrences)
MEMORY.md updated: project.json key references use 'tasks' not 'initiatives'
Prescriptive guidance in .context/lessons/*.md updated (not historical narrative)

tasks.title: Update CLAUDE.md and SKILL.md for new terminology and structure
